title: evangelion is not gay
wikitext:
[]: evangelion is not gay!!!! Post by thomas » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:03 am All my friends tell me that Evangelion it's gay (evan the girls), and they tell me to see Narotu.... But I don't like action and they don't even watch the show!! :evil:

[]: Post by Kaysow » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:14 am OMNGF STFU NOOB!!!111!1!1elevn It's freaking intelligent, so being a fan might render you pompous and/or pretentious in the eyes of many. But seeing as your friends are seriously recommending Naruto, their opinions matter none. Casual animefans usually can't be trusted on matter such as this. Real animefans, I would not know. I don't socialize with those. This is more like my guilty pleasure.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:23 am I imagine this thread will be locked shortly (or maybe not, I could be wrong). But either way, I find it rather amusing. :) So I say something worthwile in this post, I'll just say this: One of the first signs you're dealing with immature idiots is when they use the term 'gay' to attack something. To me, it sounds about as ignorant as someone 60 years ago using the N word to attack something they didn't like. It's beyond stupid.

[]: Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:26 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: I imagine this thread will be locked shortly (or maybe not, I could be wrong). But either way, I find it rather amusing. :) So I say something worthwile in this post, I'll just say this: One of the first signs you're dealing with immature idiots is when they use the term 'gay' to attack something. To me, it sounds about as ignorant as someone 60 years ago using the N word to attack something they didn't like. It's beyond stupid.

[]: Re: evangelion is not gay!!!! Post by Opteron-O3 » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:27 am thomas wrote: All my friends tell me that Evangelion it's gay (evan the girls), and they tell me to see Narotu.... But I don't like action and they don't even watch the show!! :evil:

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:50 am I hate how people think gay=stupid, really pisses me off. What, so just because I'm gay (using it as an umberalla term here, I'm bi) it means I'm stupid? Immature 15 year old who don't even know how the world works and are gonna be flipping burgers all their life if they don't grow the fuck up, please . :roll: Anyway, just because they don't like Eva or a certian anime does NOT mean its stupid, it simply means it doesn't go along with their tastes.

[]: Post by BrikHaus » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:52 am Your friends are right. Evangelion is the gayest anime ever.

[]: Post by Kaysow » Sun Apr 08, 2007 11:55 am As for the term gay, I use it fervently to mock people. Not online, because it's not as funny in english as in swedish. But I do reserve the right to keep doing that, edra jÃ¤vla bÃ¶gar.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Apr 08, 2007 12:01 pm Clearly these people mocking Eva don't know that "gay" now means "cool". And it has meant that since the Crab People episode of South Park.

[]: Post by thomas » Sun Apr 08, 2007 12:02 pm i don't say or think gay=stupid (i'm bi or gay [I don't know yet] to, and they know it) they say that just who act a little like a girl can watch Evangelion.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 08, 2007 12:02 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyway, just because they don't like Eva or a certian anime does NOT mean its stupid, it simply means it doesn't go along with their tastes.

[]: Post by Trigger's Elysium » Sun Apr 08, 2007 12:05 pm Yes, and i'm sure the collective of 15 year old Narutards must be among the manliest of men. Listen to Eva Yojimbo. He's articulating what I want to say, only better. =X

[]: Post by Opteron-O3 » Sun Apr 08, 2007 12:09 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Anyway, just because they don't like Eva or a certian anime does NOT mean its stupid, it simply means it doesn't go along with their tastes.

[]: Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sun Apr 08, 2007 12:11 pm Trigger's Elysium wrote: Yes, and i'm sure the collective of 15 year old Narutards must be among the manliest of men. Listen to Eva Yojimbo. He's articulating what I want to say, only better. =X

[]: Re: evangelion is not gay!!!! Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Apr 08, 2007 1:08 pm thomas wrote: All my friends tell me that Evangelion it's gay (evan the girls), and they tell me to see Narotu.... But I don't like action and they don't even watch the show!! :evil:

[]: Post by Executor » Sun Apr 08, 2007 2:29 pm Different tatses. If their beligerant about it, then tell them to fuck off. Simple enough.

[]: Post by NAveryW » Sun Apr 08, 2007 2:30 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: touchÃ©

[]: Post by slothen » Sun Apr 08, 2007 2:31 pm why are you posting this here? this is a site of Evangelion fans, how are we supposed to reply to this?

[]: Post by Zkh » Sun Apr 08, 2007 2:42 pm Maybe they've only seen episode 24? On another note, I am 15 and around A LOT of Naruto fans and such, most of them have never heard of Evangelion, guess that's a good thing. The term 'gay' basically means stupid now, amazing how a few years of overuse can change a word entirely. Just ignore your 'friends', like what you want to like, just don't be an ass back to them and insult everything they like, because then you'd be just as bad as them, Beauty is in the eye of the beholder.

[]: Post by slothen » Sun Apr 08, 2007 2:45 pm Zkh wrote: On another note, I am 15 and around A LOT of Naruto fans and such, most of them have never heard of Evangelion, guess that's a good thing. The term 'gay' basically means stupid now, amazing how a few years of overuse can change a word entirely.
